calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions And Request For Order Determining Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Portion Of Residuary Estate Withheld For Absent Beneficiaries And Allowance Of Attorney?S Fees And Increase Of Reserve
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 07/13/2026 per counsel's request (via e-mail on 06/03/2026).
EXAMINER: EDWARD MIYAUCHI

Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Continued To Jan-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Barry A. Schneider, Esq., for and with Peggy L. Grundman, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court recognizes the recently filed supplemental declaration and acknowledges that it is satisfied with the efforts to locate additional Beneficiaries. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to the instant petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-14-2021 and codicil dated Mar-13-2022 are admitted to probate. Peggy L. Grundemann is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-06-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2023 Continued To Dec-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
